# COBBS, Anduril, and Nokia Join Forces to Accelerate Sovereign Counter-Drone Capability in Belgium

COBBS BELUX, Anduril Industries, and Nokia Belgium have formed a joint consortium to develop and deploy sovereign counter-UAS capabilities protecting military sites and critical infrastructure across Belgium.
